library_preparation_preflight.summary: No deterministic setup is needed. The resolved artifact is the Git CLI-backed Maven SCM provider and its normal compile/runtime dependencies are transitive; the reported failure is generated-test API drift in GitTagCommand.createCommandLine, not a missing dependency, Docker service, environment variable, or system property.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No special environment variable or system property is required. If tests execute real git commands rather than only command-line builders/consumers, create a temporary local git repository and configure repository-local user.name and user.email inside the test before commit/tag operations; avoid relying on network remotes or host-global git config.
risks: The provider shells out to the git executable. Ubuntu runners normally provide git, but tests that execute real commands can fail on hosts without git.
Real commit/tag coverage may be sensitive to local git identity/config unless the test sets repository-local config explicitly.

Avoid adding upstream test-helper artifacts unless a specific generated test actually needs them; meaningful provider coverage is reachable through public provider classes and transitive dependencies.

input_evidence.name: issue
